name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cobalt Strike Inbound Traffic
notes: This Building Block triggers when a TLS fingerprint known to be a communication from a Cobalt Strike server is detected.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cobalt Strike Inbound Traffic on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the source is Remote
when the flow matches TLS JA3S Hash is not N/A
when the flow matches TLS JA3S Hash is any of [b742b407517bac9536a77a7b0fee28e9 or ae4edc6faf64d08308082ad26be60767 or 649d6810e8392f63dc311eecb6b7098b]
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cobalt Strike Inbound Traffic on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the source is Remote
AND when the flow matches TLS JA3S Hash is not N/A
AND when the flow matches TLS JA3S Hash is any of [b742b407517bac9536a77a7b0fee28e9 or ae4edc6faf64d08308082ad26be60767 or 649d6810e8392f63dc311eecb6b7098b]
